completed_tasks.name: Create independent admin build and boundary gates
Implement admin-owned auth, 2FA, authorization boundary, and responsive shell
Migrate governance pages and admin-owned API client
Migrate organizations, roles, access, scope types, and audit tools
Migrate users, departments, and incident-type administration
Add independent Docker, Nginx, deployment, and local topology
Add integration and independent admin E2E coverage
completed_tasks.progress: Two-server Playwright topology, deterministic guarded fixtures, Vite proxy contract, auth spec, and governance spec are implemented. Auth behaviors are green across receipts; governance cases are green across receipts. Organization mutation spec is incomplete and was interrupted on its first form-label selector. Access and users/departments specs, CI wiring, final clean reruns, and task report remain.

remaining_tasks.name: Complete integration and independent admin E2E coverage
Cleanup, full verification, and independent R3 audit

blockers.description: The shared PostgreSQL test database on port 5433 is also used by an active authorization worktree and cannot safely host admin E2E migrate:fresh runs concurrently.
blockers.workaround: Run locally with ADMIN_E2E_DB_DATABASE=iradah_pmo_admin_e2e_test. That isolated database already exists in erada-platform-postgres-test; CI may use its isolated default iradah_pmo_test database.

blockers.description: The main working tree contains extensive unrelated Meetings changes, including resources/js/app.tsx, which Task 10 must edit narrowly.
blockers.workaround: Use exact-path operations, re-read the live app.tsx diff immediately before Task 10, preserve all Meetings hunks byte-for-byte, and never stage globally.

decisions.decision: Keep one Laravel backend and one PostgreSQL data model while extracting a separately built React admin frontend.
decisions.rationale: The required independence is frontend runtime, build, deployment, and route ownership, not duplicated business logic or data.

decisions.decision: Use literal super_admin as the only global control-plane admission rule in frontend and canonical APIs.
decisions.rationale: Bounded manage_organization permission is not equivalent to global administration.

decisions.decision: Serve /api and /sanctum through the admin origin reverse proxy.
decisions.rationale: This preserves Sanctum cookie and CSRF behavior without introducing browser token storage or a second CORS authentication mode.

decisions.decision: Keep canonical /api/admin aliases and legacy endpoints during cutover.
decisions.rationale: It makes cutover reversible and avoids a flag-day migration or data rollback.

decisions.decision: Allow only extension-qualified Vite source modules to bypass the /api development proxy.
decisions.rationale: resources/admin/api/adminApi.ts was otherwise sent to Laravel; real JSON /api requests must continue to proxy.

decisions.decision: Use a file session store and create storage/framework/sessions during real-browser E2E.
decisions.rationale: The array test session had no cross-request state and the file store initially failed because its ignored runtime directory was absent.

decisions.decision: Parameterize the local admin E2E test database.
decisions.rationale: ADMIN_E2E_DB_DATABASE and ADMIN_E2E_DB_PORT allow local isolation while retaining CI defaults.

next_action: Read the required documents and this handoff, confirm the unrelated Meetings diff is untouched, inspect the interrupted organization E2E screenshot/error context, fix the exact form-label locator, and finish Task 9 serially using ADMIN_E2E_DB_DATABASE=iradah_pmo_admin_e2e_test.
context_notes: Branch main at 4b81476. Tasks 1-8 are committed and independently approved. Task 9 has no commit yet. No Playwright, Vite, or Laravel E2E listeners remain on ports 4174 or 8000. The local isolated database iradah_pmo_admin_e2e_test exists on postgres-test port 5433 and currently contains the deterministic admin fixture. Preserve unrelated Meetings, AGENTS.md, graphify-out, and other user-owned dirty files. Final completion requires Tasks 9-11, full verification, and a fresh read-only R3 audit.
